security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1430 http://localhost:1430

bundle.shortDescription: Desktop universe compendium reader for the Everend Forge suite
bundle.longDescription: Everend Compendium turns a WorldNotion vault and PathBranching's saved stories into a readable universe edition. The desktop reader adds interactive graph, timeline, and map views on top of the same portable Markdown canon.
